x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Overly permissive or missing ACLs on core tables can allow AI Agents to read or write data beyond intended scope. Proper ACL coverage is a prerequisite for production AI Agent enablement.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review ACLs on incident, task, change_request, and cmdb_ci tables via sys_security_acl_list.do. Ensure read/write ACLs are properly scoped for AI Agent service accounts. Test AI Agent operations against ACL policies in sub-production.
